batch_summary: Deed [328] is the Affidavit of Heirship with Will Attached for Genevieve B. Dorsett (LC Inst# 00992049, Vol. 1011, Pg. 194–196, filed 05/12/1999). This is ISSUE-43 item 12. The instrument was executed by Genevieve's three children (Lawrence L. Dorsett, Donald J. Dorsett, Diane D. Scripps) as sole heirs. Key new finding: L.L. Dorsett's full name is Laroy Lee Dorsett (born 1/22/1911, died 12/9/1980) — this narrows the previously known 'deceased before Feb 1993' to an exact date. Marriage date confirmed: January 13, 1933. Genevieve born in Delta County, TX. Will dated March 5, 1981 leaves everything equally to three children in fee simple; Donald J. Dorsett named Independent Executor. Estate consisted entirely of personal property (~$23,200 in bank accounts and burial plots) — no real property at death, consistent with the Boyd Survey disposition in 1975 (deed [318]) and the 1993 trust transfer (deed [325]). Name variant noted: will spells 'Schripps' vs affidavit/deed [325] spelling 'Scripps.' NON-PROJECT PROPERTY — no impact on Black/Bounds chain. ISSUE-01 remains RESOLVED.

operations.replace_with: and was in Tehuacana at death (1999). **Deed [328] (PDF CONFIRMED 2026-03-31)**: Affidavit of Heirship with Will Attached, Lawrence L. Dorsett + Donald J. Dorsett + Diane D. Scripps (affiants, sole surviving children) → Public. LC Vol. 1011, Pg. 194–196, Inst# 00992049, Doc# 992049. Filed May 12, 1999 9:56 AM; recorded May 13, 1999 4:00 PM; Sue Lown, County Clerk. Confirms: (a) L.L. Dorsett full name **Laroy Lee Dorsett** (born 1/22/1911, died 12/9/1980); (b) married once only to Genevieve, January 13, 1933; Genevieve born April 4, 1913 in Delta County, TX; (c) three children sole heirs (same three as deed [325]); no adoptions; (d) will dated March 5, 1981 (attached as Exhibit A): all property equally to three children in fee simple, Donald J. Dorsett Independent Executor, no bond required; (e) estate = personal property only — checking account ~$6,000 (First Mexia Bank, after funeral expenses), CD ~$16,000 (First State Bank, Coolidge), 12 burial plots ~$1,200 (Tehuacana Cemetery) — **no real property in estate at death**; (f) no administration necessary; estate below federal/state tax exemptions; (g) ⚠️ NAME VARIANT: will spells daughter's name "Schripps" (with h) vs affidavit body and deed [325] spelling "Scripps" — probable scrivener's error in 1981 will. Will witnesses: Shirley Schneider, Joe Cannon. Affiants sworn on separate dates: Lawrence L. Dorsett May 4, 1999 (Martha Lummus NP, Texas); Donald J. Dorsett May 11, 1999 (Carol J. Rhodes NP, Texas); Diane D. Scripps April 26, 1999 (Terrie E. Atchison NP, Alabama — Diane resided in Alabama at time of signing). **Estate confirms no Limestone County real property remained in Genevieve's name at death** — the 100×137 ft lot had been conveyed to the trust in 1993 (deed [325]), and the Boyd Survey was sold in 1975 (deed [318]). The trust disposed of its property post-death to Tiblier (Inst# 00003589, 08/25/2000). ISSUE-43 item 12. ISSUE-01 (resolved — independent research value only). |

operations.anchor: ISSUE-43 items 12–15 (Dorsett/Ennis instruments) are no longer needed for Boyd Survey resolution but may have independent research value for other Dorsett/Ennis Limestone County land transactions.
operations.content: - **Deed [328] analysis (2026-03-31)**: Affidavit of Heirship with Will Attached (LC Inst# 00992049, Vol. 1011, Pg. 194–196, Doc# 992049, executed 4/26/1999, filed 5/12/1999, recorded 5/13/1999). Affiants: Lawrence L. Dorsett, Donald J. Dorsett, Diane D. Scripps — sole surviving children of Genevieve B. Dorsett (4/4/1913–4/5/1999). **Key finding: L.L. Dorsett’s full name is Laroy Lee Dorsett** (born 1/22/1911, died 12/9/1980). Married Genevieve once only on 1/13/1933. This narrows L.L. Dorsett’s death from the previous estimate (“before Feb 1993” per deed [325]) to a specific date — he died 14 months before the 1981 will and 12 years before the 1992 trust. Will (3/5/1981, Exhibit A): leaves all property equally to three children in fee simple; Donald J. Dorsett named Independent Executor, no bond. Estate at death: personal property only — checking account ~$6,000, CD ~$16,000, 12 burial plots ~$1,200. **No real property in estate.** The 100×137 ft lot was already in the trust (deed [325], 1993), and the Boyd Survey had been sold in 1975 (deed [318]). Affiants state no administration was necessary; estate below tax exemptions. ⚠️ Name variant: will spells “Schripps” (with h) vs “Scripps” in affidavit body and deed [325] — probable scrivener’s error in 1981 will. Diane D. Scripps signed in Alabama (Terrie E. Atchison NP, State of Alabama) — consistent with Genevieve’s Alabama connections per deed [318] (1975 acknowledgment in Jefferson County, AL). **T.K. Dorsett question**: With L.L. Dorsett’s full name now known as Laroy Lee Dorsett, genealogical research can determine whether T.K. Dorsett (Boyd Survey, 1949–1952) is related. ISSUE-01 remains RESOLVED. ISSUE-43 item 12 is now PULLED.
